nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Amitabha. Benefactor, have you come from afar to comprehend the Way of Go?

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: This old monk's Dharma name is Yideng. I was once the King of Dali, but now I've entered the Buddhist path. Life is like Go - between black and white lies all karma.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: This old monk's 'Solar Finger' is renowned. The methods of internal force application within it are exquisitely marvelous when applied to Go.

options.text: I want to learn the 'Solar Finger'
Master, I'd like to play another game with you
How is Solar Finger used in Go?

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: 'Solar Finger' emphasizes using a single point's force to resolve tremendous pressure. In Go, one crucial stone surpasses a thousand useless ones.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: This technique allows you to place a stone at a critical position, producing a 'pierce the heavens' effect, instantly reversing the situation. However, it requires extremely high Go skill to execute.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Excellent, excellent. Though this old monk has become a monk, my Go cultivation remains as it was. If you want to learn this technique, you must first prove you have this understanding.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Years ago, this old monk played against Eastern Heretic and Western Venom, deeply understanding Go's subtleties. If you can beat this old monk, it shows you've comprehended the principle of 'Solar.'

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Benefactor, your Go skill is superb and your state of mind clear - you truly have understanding. In that case, this old monk will teach you the essence of 'Solar Finger.'

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: at crucial moments, use the force of 'Solar' to point directly at the vital spot, one stone determining victory. Limited to once per game with a 30-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Remember, 'Solar returns, all things renew.' When using this technique, be single-minded and fully focused to unleash its maximum power.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Now that benefactor has learned this technique, when facing strong enemies in the future, you can respond calmly. But remember, 'too rigid is easily broken' - always leave room in all things.

options.text: Thank you for your teaching, Master!
I'd like to hear more of your teachings
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged, benefactor. This old monk also endured many hardships when learning before achieving success. Take your time, no need to rush.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: This old monk was once a king, but later became a monk due to heartbreak. In the game of life, between gain and loss, what difference is there?

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Now this old monk has seen through it. Life is like Go - no regrets after placing stones. Whether winning or losing, as long as you have a clear conscience, it's a good game.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Excellent, excellent, the time is not yet right. When benefactor is ready, you can come to Tianlong Temple to find this old monk anytime.

nodes.speaker: Master Yideng
nodes.text: Amitabha. Benefactor, cultivate well and you'll surely succeed in the future.
